subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in God! The essence of divine communion lieth in faith in the signs of God... for physical education hath no lasting effect [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بالله اصل لقاء ایمان بآیات الهیه است ...زیرا تربیت جسمانیه را حکمی نه بلکه
subcodes.subjects: @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
